title: DfE update 10 December 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Information Updates to apprenticeship Sector Subject Area (SSA) codes   Your feedback Further education workforce survey - deadline extended     Latest information for academies     Article Title     Action Submit your financial statements and accounts return   Information Pupil premium allocations for 2025 to 2026 financial year – quarter 3 update   Information A new DfE programme: Maximising Value for Pupils   Reminder One week to the academies land and buildings collection tool deadline   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return 2024 to 25   Events and webinars Academies chart of accounts and automation question and answer drop-in session   Events and webinars Academies chart of accounts and automation question and answer drop-in session   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return 2024 to 25   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return 2024 to 25   Events and webinars Spring term webinars and power hours for school business professionals     Latest information for local authorities     Article Title     Information Pupil premium allocations for 2025 to 2026 financial year – quarter 3 update   Information Schools national funding formula 2026 to 2027 COLLECT tables now live   Information A new DfE programme: Maximising Value for Pupils   Events and webinars Spring term webinars and power hours for school business professionals    "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
School and academy financial management and assurance
